## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] CI/Build tooling

## How to test

List the exact steps/commands used to verify this change.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `make fmt`, `make vet`, and `make test` locally (or explained why not).
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior, APIs, or commands changed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for non-trivial behavior changes.
- [ ] I confirmed no secrets or private credentials are included.
- [ ] I confirmed new templates/assets are redistributable under compatible terms.
